problem id: c62359ea
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  10011100 -> 10000010
  00011101 -> 10100000
  10011001 -> 00100010
  01101011 -> 01100001
  00000011 -> 01100000
  11111110 -> 11000011
  10110101 -> 10100010
  10110111 -> 11100010
  10001011 -> 01100010

query: 00010010
predicted answer: 01000000
